title: Sintel - A Cosmic Animated Journey
description: Sintel is an independently produced CGI animated film by the Blender Foundation. It tells the moving story of a girl named Sintel who rescues a baby dragon and goes on a perilous, life-long search to find her companion. Explore high-fidelity character rendering, gorgeous landscapes, and epic action sequences styled with cinematic precision.

title: Big Buck Bunny - Forest Showdown
description: Big Buck Bunny tells the story of a giant rabbit with a heart of gold whose daily routine is rudely interrupted by three mischievous rodents. He decides to take a comedic and creative revenge. Experience high-definition animation with fluid mechanics, rich environment textures, and timeless humor.

title: Tears of Steel - Neo Amsterdam Sci-Fi
description: Set in a dystopian future in Amsterdam, Tears of Steel explores a futuristic conflict between humans and giant biomechanical spiders. It combines live-action footage with cutting-edge open source visual effects. Perfect for testing high-contrast dark-mode action, motion tracking, and immersive soundscapes.
